rationale: Internal API refactor simplifying settings classes; no spec-defined behavior involved.
Internal API refactor of GridFS settings inheritance; API ergonomics, not a GridFS spec rule violation.
InvalidCastException when reading MaxDocuments as Double vs Int32; internal type handling, no spec rule violated.
NullReferenceException in GetIPEndPoint on shard routers; internal threading/null bug, no spec rule.
Deprecating static Create methods in BsonDocument API; pure API ergonomics cleanup.
Deprecating RawValue/RawValues properties; API simplification with no spec involvement.
Removing redundant forwarding properties from BsonObjectId wrapper class; API cleanup only.
Deprecating BsonDocument indexer overload; API ergonomics cleanup, no spec rule.
BSON spec allows empty string as document key; DictionarySerializer rejects it, violating spec.
Adding 'nupdated' field to SystemProfileInfo helper class; profiling data surface, no spec rule.
LINQ OrderBy throws for boxed value-type expressions; C# LINQ translation bug, no spec area.
Deprecating MongoServer/MongoDatabase indexers; API ergonomics cleanup, no spec.
Replacing AsDateTime with ToLocalTime/ToUniversalTime; API ergonomics improvement, no BSON spec rule.
Deprecating ReadFrom/WriteTo in favor of serialization machinery; internal API consolidation.
Fixing TimeSpanSerializer multipliers and precision; C#-specific serializer bug, no MongoDB spec.
Redesigning convention system for BsonClassMap automapping; internal ORM architecture refactor.
Connection pool not honoring MaxConnectionIdleTime/MaxConnectionLifeTime strictly; pre-CMAP-spec pool implementation bug.
Over-eager expression tree normalization in LINQ translator; C# LINQ internal bug, no spec area.
Wrong field names in SystemProfileInfoSerializer (lockStats, timeAcquiringMicros); internal profiling helper, no spec rule.
Refactoring serializer instance creation to avoid premature freezing of defaults; internal architecture refactor.
Replacing open/close-per-10s ping connection with a dedicated persistent one; pre-SDAM-spec implementation improvement.
Feature request for additional BsonValue.ReadFrom overloads; API ergonomics, no spec.
BsonId attribute not populating private _id field after Insert; C# ORM mapping bug, no spec rule.
Query.Or returns wrong result when subquery is {}; internal query builder logic bug, no spec rule.
BsonClassMap auto-maps embedded class Id to _id undesirably; C# ORM convention bug, no spec.
Preventing registration of serializers for BsonValue subclasses; internal API enforcement, no spec.
Lambda expression resolution fails for interface members in BsonClassMap; C# ORM regression bug.
ObjectId constructor should validate component ranges; defensive API improvement, no spec rule.
KeyValuePairSerializer throws on null value due to null dereference; C# serializer implementation bug.
Driver fails to reconnect to secondary after both primary and secondary bounce; pre-SDAM-spec reconnection bug.
Feature request for Query.In overload accepting IEnumerable<ObjectId>; API ergonomics, no spec.
ObjectId.Unpack exception has parameter name and message swapped; trivial error message bug.
IntelliSense tooltip for FindOne says it returns a cursor; documentation bug only.
Connection pool exhaustion under load; performance/resource issue, no specific spec rule violated.
Feature request for BsonValue.AsDBRef() helper to simplify DBRef fetching; API ergonomics only.
UpdateBuilder.Combine incompatible with UpdateBuilder<T>; C# type-system API design issue, no spec.
Adding $elemMatch projection support for MongoDB 2.2; new feature addition, not a spec nonconformance.
ConventionProfile missing DiscriminatorConvention property; internal ORM feature gap, no spec.
Thread abort during serialization causes crash; runtime/threading bug, no spec rule involved.
Driver fails to recover after network failure; pre-SDAM-spec reconnection robustness bug.
Infinite loop and bad timeout error message in DiscoveringMongoServerProxy; internal proxy logic bug.
Application crash from type mismatch (double vs DateTime) in multithreaded scenario; internal concurrency bug.
BsonClassMap.SetIdMember throws for lambda expressions resolving interface members; C# ORM regression.
Connection forcibly closed by remote host; network failure handling bug, no specific spec rule.
LINQ supported features documentation out of date; documentation bug only.
Feature request for PreSerialize/AfterDeserialize lifecycle hook interface; API ergonomics, no spec.
Visual Studio installer build fails; build/packaging issue, no driver behavior.
MongoDatabase.Eval drops single argument; wire command serialization bug but db.eval is not a spec-covered area.
Feature request for enum support in Update<T>.BitwiseAnd/Or; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
